name: hia-documentation-sys-main
description: Core monorepo for the HIA documentation engineering system.

scripts.check: pnpm run build && pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:e2e && pnpm run devtools:check && pnpm run visual-studio:check
scripts.distribution:check: node scripts/check-distribution-readiness.mjs && node scripts/check-public-release-plan.mjs && node scripts/check-public-package-contents.mjs
scripts.distribution:check:publish-ready: node scripts/check-distribution-readiness.mjs --publish-ready && node scripts/check-public-release-plan.mjs --publish-ready && node scripts/check-public-package-contents.mjs
scripts.release:gate: pnpm run check && pnpm run schema:check && pnpm run schema:site && pnpm run distribution:check && pnpm run reference:definition:check && pnpm run reference:portal:data:check && pnpm run reference:portal:build && pnpm run reference:portal:check && node scripts/release-gate-jsdoc-smoke.mjs && pnpm run governance:check && pnpm run license:audit
scripts.release:gate:publish-ready: pnpm run check && pnpm run schema:check && pnpm run schema:site && pnpm run distribution:check:publish-ready && pnpm run reference:definition:check && pnpm run reference:portal:data:check && pnpm run reference:portal:build && pnpm run reference:portal:check && node scripts/release-gate-jsdoc-smoke.mjs && pnpm run governance:check && pnpm run license:audit
scripts.wp32:ai-context:evidence: pnpm run build && pnpm run ai-authoring:evidence
scripts.wp32:draft-proposal:evidence: pnpm run build && pnpm run ai-authoring:evidence
scripts.wp32:review-payload:evidence: pnpm run build && pnpm run ai-authoring:evidence
scripts.wp32:locale-quality:evidence: pnpm run build && pnpm run ai-authoring:evidence
scripts.wp32:readiness:evidence: pnpm run build && pnpm run ai-authoring:evidence && node scripts/prepare-wp32-readiness-evidence.mjs
scripts.wp33:host-review:evidence: pnpm run build && pnpm run ai-authoring:evidence && pnpm run vscode:source-linkage:evidence && pnpm run vscode:project-relations:evidence && pnpm run devtools:check && pnpm run visual-studio:check && node scripts/prepare-wp33-host-review-readiness-evidence.mjs
scripts.wp34:host-apply-preview:evidence: pnpm run wp34:vscode-apply-preview:evidence && pnpm run devtools:check && pnpm run visual-studio:check && node scripts/prepare-wp34-host-apply-preview-evidence.mjs
scripts.wp35:provider-boundary:audit: pnpm run wp34:closeout:evidence && pnpm run ai-authoring:evidence && node scripts/prepare-wp35-provider-boundary-audit.mjs
scripts.wp35:provider-adapter:evidence: pnpm run wp35:provider-boundary:audit && pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @hia-doc/provider-sdk test && node scripts/prepare-wp35-provider-adapter-evidence.mjs
scripts.wp35:provider-mock:evidence: pnpm run wp35:provider-adapter:evidence && pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @hia-doc/provider-mock test && node scripts/prepare-wp35-provider-mock-evidence.mjs
scripts.wp35:provider-runner:evidence: pnpm run wp35:provider-mock:evidence && pnpm run build && pnpm --filter @hia-doc/provider-runner test && node scripts/prepare-wp35-provider-runner-evidence.mjs
scripts.wp35:host-review:evidence: pnpm run wp35:provider-runner:evidence && pnpm run build && pnpm run devtools:check && pnpm run visual-studio:check && node scripts/prepare-wp35-host-review-provider-evidence.mjs
scripts.wp36:safe-invocation:evidence: pnpm run wp36:source-privacy:evidence && pnpm run build && node scripts/prepare-wp36-safe-invocation-dry-run.mjs
scripts.wp37:host-edit-transaction:evidence: pnpm run wp37:checked-apply-baseline:audit && pnpm run ai-authoring:evidence && node scripts/prepare-wp37-host-edit-transaction-evidence.mjs
scripts.wp37:vscode-confirmation:evidence: pnpm run wp37:rollback-formatter-audit:evidence && pnpm run build && node scripts/prepare-wp37-vscode-checked-apply-confirmation-evidence.mjs
scripts.wp38:vscode-gui-confirmation:evidence: pnpm run wp38:writable-sandbox:evidence && pnpm run build && node scripts/prepare-wp38-vscode-real-gui-confirmation-evidence.mjs
scripts.wp38:host-parity:evidence: pnpm run devtools:check && pnpm run visual-studio:check && node scripts/prepare-wp38-devtools-visual-studio-confirmation-parity-evidence.mjs
scripts.wp39:devtools-runtime-packet:evidence: pnpm run wp39:host-runtime-intake:evidence && pnpm run devtools:check && node scripts/prepare-wp39-devtools-runtime-capture-packet-evidence.mjs
scripts.wp39:visual-studio-runtime-prep:evidence: pnpm run wp39:host-runtime-intake:evidence && pnpm run visual-studio:check && node scripts/prepare-wp39-visual-studio-runtime-preparation-evidence.mjs
scripts.wp39:runtime-normalization:evidence: pnpm run wp39:vscode-runtime-packet:evidence && pnpm run wp39:devtools-runtime-packet:evidence && pnpm run wp39:visual-studio-runtime-prep:evidence && node scripts/prepare-wp39-runtime-evidence-normalization.mjs
scripts.wp41:target-owner-intake:evidence: pnpm run wp40:closeout:evidence && pnpm run wp38:remote-provider-smoke-gate:evidence && pnpm run wp38:target-branch-pr-flow:evidence && node scripts/prepare-wp41-target-owner-flow-intake.mjs
scripts.wp29:host:evidence: pnpm run build && pnpm run vscode:source-linkage:evidence && pnpm run vscode:project-relations:evidence && pnpm run devtools:check && pnpm run visual-studio:check && pnpm run ai-authoring:evidence
